options.text: Who are you and why are you here?

78cd7f31-93b9-4da5-89f7-11f3096c8d2b.title: <player>
78cd7f31-93b9-4da5-89f7-11f3096c8d2b.text: Who are you and why are you here?

ca4ae1cc-6f8f-4bd2-9194-4016a934c574.title: Larran
ca4ae1cc-6f8f-4bd2-9194-4016a934c574.text:
Once I was a merchant. I worked hard and became
wealthy, very wealthy. I was brave too, storing my
possessions in two great chests here, where few would
dare to interfere with them.

2dcc5050-fa32-4c5b-8e73-57a146e786a8.title: Larran
2dcc5050-fa32-4c5b-8e73-57a146e786a8.text:
But I was not strong enough. One day a witch allied
with the pirates of the north; between their strength and
her magic, they killed me. The pirates carried one of
my chests away to their ship.

4db51f23-0cad-4306-8166-f3102b3cfce9.title: Larran
4db51f23-0cad-4306-8166-f3102b3cfce9.text:
I keep vigil here now, as it interests me to watch
adventurers come to raid this little chest, whenever they
can find one of my keys.

d1e0ebbc-3b33-462a-af04-8900d063b4ee.title: Larran
d1e0ebbc-3b33-462a-af04-8900d063b4ee.text:
My bigger chest was taken north to the pirates' ship - a
brave adventurer may like to raid that one instead, if
they can handle the perils of the north. I kept more
wealth in that one.

8b82ae73-61c6-4430-8195-816f428aa455.title: Larran
8b82ae73-61c6-4430-8195-816f428aa455.text:
If you want my worldly goods, open my chests with my
keys. Adventurers occasionally find my keys while
slaying monsters in the Wilderness, on assignment from
the witch Krystilia.

26e680e8-51bc-41a4-bdab-319921d2bbf1.title: Larran
26e680e8-51bc-41a4-bdab-319921d2bbf1.text:
I do not know why Krystilia sends adventurers to find
my keys instead of looting the chest herself. Perhaps it
amuses her to send people into this land to risk their
lives.

options.text: Who are you and why are you here?

09c51f12-388a-4a53-b855-ba36f4347d18.title: Larran
09c51f12-388a-4a53-b855-ba36f4347d18.text: I will be here if you return.
